user.title: Set up Social Home
user.description: Enter the URL of your Social Home instance and an API token generated in Settings → Security.

hassio_confirm.title: Social Home is ready
hassio_confirm.description: Social Home was detected as a Home Assistant App for {username}. Confirm to finish setup.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Social Home
reauth_confirm.description: Your Social Home token has expired or been revoked. Paste a fresh token generated in Settings → Security.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Social Home instance — check the URL.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed — check the API token.

abort.already_configured: This Social Home account is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Social Home instance.

init.title: Social Home options
init.description: Choose what the integration syncs between Home Assistant and Social Home.

data.sync_location: Sync person location to Social Home
